dismissalText.commentary: Abhishek Sharma c †Samson b Overton 59 (22b 6x4 4x6 37m) SR: 268.18

dismissalComment.html: Woof, what a ripper out of nowhere. Back of a length and just shapes away from Abhishek. The ball flies off the pitch and towards Sanju, who insists on a review. Could be a faint edge here... And there's a big spike as the ball passes bat. Just like that, Abhishek's been taken out!

dismissalText.commentary: Travis Head c Gaikwad b Mukesh Choudhary 23 (20b 3x4 1x6 24m) SR: 115

dismissalComment.html: Can you believe this? The worst ball of the over, a full toss offered up right outside off. Head boshes this one and somehow spears it straight to Gaikwad stationed at mid-off for that exact shot. How did he find the fielder off that ball! The ebbs and flows of T20 cricket, you suppose...

dismissalText.commentary: Ishan Kishan c Gaikwad b Mukesh Choudhary 0 (1b 0x4 0x6 1m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: Slammed straight to mid-off! Mistimed this ball outside off. Kishan just swings at it like he's wielding an axe too heavy in his hand. Loses his shape and deposits it to Gaikwad once more. He's taken two in two. Welp (for SRH fans)... It's game on for the CSK ones!

dismissalText.commentary: Heinrich Klaasen b Kamboj 59 (39b 6x4 2x6 56m) SR: 151.28

dismissalComment.html: drags this back onto the stumps! Kamboj's impressive season continues. What a massive moment. Once again it's the angle that he takes across from wide of the crease, Klaasen believes he's got room to scythe this behind point, apparently not. Drags back.

dismissalText.commentary: Nitish Kumar Reddy c Short b Overton 12 (8b 0x4 1x6 15m) SR: 150

dismissalComment.html: another one bites the dust and Overton's surge continues. NKR looks to muscle this over long-on but the ball got a tad bigger on him which meant he didn't get the kind of elevation he would've liked. Well held at long-on. Had the promise of a more-impactful innings. Short was a couple of yards in, so he had to leap high to get to that and he did that quite nicely.

dismissalText.commentary: Salil Arora c Brevis b Gurjapneet Singh 13 (12b 2x4 0x6 23m) SR: 108.33

dismissalComment.html: straight into Brewis' mitts at deep cover! Gurjapneet does well to bowl full and take this across, somewhat away from his hitting arc. Arora does well to reach that but he's also taking on the longest pocket at the ground, finds Brewis intercepting that with ridiculous ease.

dismissalText.commentary: Liam Livingstone c Brevis b Kamboj 1 (5b 0x4 0x6 15m) SR: 20

dismissalComment.html: swung away straight down deep midwicket's throat! Low full toss, Livingstone hit it well but ended up picking out the lone man in the deep. The SRH innings has decelerated sensationally. CSK will be mighty happy with this comeback. SRH have crossed their previous-best of 192 against CSK, but the 200 remains elusive.
